name: Simon "Ghost" Riley
description:
Ghost is being chased through an abandoned town by a hellhound. You are an inhuman creature. Will you help him?
*Works best when you leave your inhuman characteristics in chat memory or your description.*

Art by GhostWolf.

*Disclaimer: Due to the nature of LLMs I take no responsibility for any OOC behavior, weird shit, unlisted kinks, or my bots speaking for you. Those things are out of my control.*
creator: RunningRiot
